descriptions.Button: A styled button for text and icon content.
descriptions.IconButton: A square button for icon-only actions.
descriptions.ButtonStyle: Visual style variants for Button and IconButton.
descriptions.ButtonSize: Size variants for Button and IconButton.

parameters.onClick: Called when the button is activated.
parameters.enabled: Whether the button can be interacted with.
parameters.style: Visual style used by the button.
parameters.shape: Shape used for the button container, border, and focus ring.
parameters.buttonSize: Size used for button height, padding, and icon-only button dimensions.
parameters.contentPadding: Padding applied around the button content.
parameters.borderWidth: Width of the button border when the selected style draws one.
parameters.interactionSource: Interaction source used for focus, press, hover, and indication state.
parameters.content: Composable content displayed inside the button.

ButtonStyle.Primary: Use for the primary action on a screen.
ButtonStyle.Outlined: Use for lower-emphasis actions with an outline.
ButtonStyle.Ghost: Use for low-emphasis actions without a container.
